ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defender) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in cm) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in kg) */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot for players (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team is based in */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Main colors of the team (e.g., 'Red, White') */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience as a coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the coach */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the coach joined the team */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date the coach's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of Team A */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of Team B */,
  "score_a" INTEGER /* Score of Team A */,
  "score_b" INTEGER /* Score of Team B */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game (e.g., 'Sunny', 'Rainy') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in that game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in that game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player (goals + assists) */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties taken by the player in that game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves (for goalkeepers) */,
  "substitute_in" TEXT /* Time the player came in as a substitute (null if not substituted) */,
  "substitute_out" TEXT /* Time the player was substituted out (null if played the full game) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals_for - goals_against) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the standings were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., 'Knee', 'Ankle') */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., 'Minor', 'Major') */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment or rehabilitation plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transfer record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* Team ID that the player is leaving */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* Team ID that the player is joining */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" INTEGER /* Amount of the transfer fee */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the new contract in years */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., 'Permanent', 'Loan') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance history record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Season year for the performance data */,
  "total_goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored in that season */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made in that season */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated in that season */,
  "total_shots" INTEGER /* Total shots taken in the season */,
  "total_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed in the season */,
  "total_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received in the season */,
  "total_red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received in the season */,
  "total_saves" INTEGER /* Total saves made (for goalkeepers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., 'Coach', 'Player', 'Analyst') */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID indicating the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
